Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);let d=0,m=0;const miss=[];for\(const p of fs.readdirSync\('packages'\)\){const dir='packages/'+p;if\(!fs.statSync\(dir\).isDirectory\(\)\)continue;if\(fs.existsSync\(dir+'/dist'\)\)d++;else{m++;miss.push\(p\);}}console.log\('with dist:',d,'| missing dist:',m\);if\(miss.length\)console.log\('missing:',miss.slice\(0,20\).join\(', '\)\)")
Bash(echo "=== most-referenced process.env vars in geneweave ===")
Bash(echo "=== geneweave-api scripts + a few internal deps ===")
Bash(echo "private repo: $\(git rev-list --count HEAD\) commits on $\(git branch --show-current\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0\)\);const files=d[0].files.map\(f=>f.path\);const tests=files.filter\(f=>/\\.test\\./.test\(f\)\);console.log\('  total files:',files.length,'| test files still shipped:',tests.length, tests.length?\('→ '+tests.join\(','\)\):'✓ none'\);")

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w " :3500 login \(existing dev\): %{http_code}\\n" -X POST http://localhost:3500/api/auth/login -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"email":"nope@test.dev","password":"x"}')

Bash(sqlite3 /private/tmp/geneweave-npm-test.db 'SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='\\''table'\\'' AND \(name LIKE '\\''%role%'\\'' OR name LIKE '\\''%admin%'\\'' OR name LIKE '\\''%rbac%'\\'' OR name LIKE '\\''%platform%'\\'' OR name LIKE '\\''%permission%'\\''\);')
Bash(sqlite3 /private/tmp/geneweave-npm-test.db 'SELECT persona, COUNT\(*\) FROM users GROUP BY persona;')
Bash(sqlite3 /private/tmp/geneweave-npm-test.db "SELECT substr\(password_hash,1,20\) FROM users WHERE email='giby.varghese@gmail.com';")
Bash(node -e "const t=require\('./tsconfig.json'\); console.log\(' refs:', \(t.references||[]\).length\); console.log\(' sample:', JSON.stringify\(\(t.references||[]\).slice\(0,3\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./clients/api-client/package.json'\); console.log\('  name:', p.name\); console.log\('  version:', p.version\); console.log\('  main:', p.main, '| module:', p.module, '| types:', p.types\); console.log\('  exports:', JSON.stringify\(p.exports\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./clients/mobile/package.json'\); const all={...p.dependencies,...p.devDependencies}; console.log\(' @weaveintel/api-client:', all['@weaveintel/api-client'] || 'NOT DECLARED'\); console.log\(' name:', p.name\)")
Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./packages/guardrails/package.json'\); console.log\('  name:',p.name\); console.log\('  exports:', JSON.stringify\(p.exports,null,0\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./apps/geneweave/package.json'\); const all={...p.dependencies}; console.log\(' @weaveintel/guardrails:', all['@weaveintel/guardrails']||'NOT declared'\)")
Bash(sed -i '' 's#@weaveintel/notes — the weaveNotes capability configuration#geneWeave \(weaveNotes\) — the capability configuration#' apps/geneweave/src/notes/notes-config.ts)

Bash(sed -i '' "s#import { validateWeaveNotesConfig, DEFAULT_WEAVENOTES_CONFIG, type WeaveNotesConfig } from '@weaveintel/notes';#import { validateWeaveNotesConfig, DEFAULT_WEAVENOTES_CONFIG, type WeaveNotesConfig } from './notes/notes-config.js';#" apps/geneweave/src/note-settings-sql.ts)

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./apps/geneweave-ui/package.json'\); const d={...p.dependencies}; console.log\(' @weaveintel/notes:', d['@weaveintel/notes']||'NOT declared'\); console.log\(' @weaveintel/guardrails:', d['@weaveintel/guardrails']||'no'\); console.log\(' all @weaveintel deps:', Object.keys\(d\).filter\(k=>k.startsWith\('@weaveintel'\)\).join\(', '\)\)")
Bash(sed -i '' "s#import { sanitizeColor } from './creative.js';#import { sanitizeColor } from './color-safety.js';#" packages/notes/src/ink.ts packages/notes/src/diagram.ts)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/  STICKER_PRESETS, sanitizeColor, isKnownSwatch,/  STICKER_PRESETS, isKnownSwatch,/' packages/notes/src/creative.test.ts)
Bash(grep -nA10 "export interface PresenceState\\|export type PresenceState" packages/collab/src/session.ts)
Bash(grep -nA6 "export interface PresenceHeartbeat\\|export interface PresenceScope" packages/collab/src/presence.ts)

Bash(perl -i -pe "s{import \\{ aiPeerId, aiAwarenessState \\} from '\\@weaveintel/collab';}{import { aiPeerId, aiAwarenessState, normalizePresenceStatus } from '\\@weaveintel/collab';}" apps/geneweave/src/note-ai-presence.ts)
Bash(perl -i -pe "s{import \\{ roleAtLeast \\} from '\\@weaveintel/collab';}{import { roleAtLeast, normalizePresenceStatus } from '\\@weaveintel/collab';}" apps/geneweave/src/run-control-ws.ts)

Bash(perl -i -pe "s{const state = typeof msg\\['presence'\\] === 'string' \\? msg\\['presence'\\] : 'online';}{const state = normalizePresenceStatus\(msg['presence']\);}" apps/geneweave/src/run-control-ws.ts)

Bash(perl -i -pe "s{import \\{ roleAtLeast, type SessionRole, type SubscriptionChannel \\} from '\\@weaveintel/collab';}{import { roleAtLeast, normalizePresenceStatus, type SessionRole, type SubscriptionChannel } from '\\@weaveintel/collab';}" apps/geneweave/src/routes/me.ts)

Bash(perl -0pi -e 's/\\\): ConcurrencyLimiter \\{/\): DurableConcurrencyLimiter {/g; s/getStatus\\\(\\\): ConcurrencyStatus \\{/getStatus\(\): DurableConcurrencyStatus {/g' packages/resilience/src/durable-concurrency.ts)
